description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/multiversechronicles/zax/zax-qt:master with two stages: build and test. Define a hidden .build job template that runs in the build stage, produces artifacts named after the job containing any *.apk files. In the build_debug job (stage build) run the script: mkdir build; cd build; /opt/libraries/bin/qt-cmake .. -DCMAKE_PREFIX_PATH=/opt/libraries -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DAPI_PASSWORD=\"$API_PASSWORD\" -G Ninja; ninja; then copy src/android-build/pipboy.apk to ../PipBoy-$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG-debug.apk, with BUILD_TYPE variable set to Debug. In the build_release job (stage build) run the same initial script but with BUILD_TYPE=Release, then sign the APK using /opt/android-sdk-linux/build-tools/35.0.0/apksigner sign --ks ../android/android_release.keystore --ks-pass env:KEYSTORE_PASSWORD src/android-build/pipboy.apk, and copy the signed APK to ../PipBoy-$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG.apk. The pipeline uses the API_PASSWORD and KEYSTORE_PASSWORD environment variables for the cmake command and apksigner respectively.
